title: potentilla × ferruginea
intro: Potentilla × ferruginea, also known as the cinquefoil, is a hybrid perennial plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The health benefits of Potentilla × ferruginea include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic to prevent infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
